name: Fourth Street Rose Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Whisk eggs in a large bowl.
3. Whisk sugar, flour until smooth. Set aside.
4. Cut rhubarb and frozen strawberries into small pieces.
5. Fold the fruit mixture into the egg mixture.
6. Pour the filling into the pie shell.
7. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F and apply topping with remaining ingredients.
9. Bake for an additional 40 minutes.
